description: The Move Toploader bag from belkin comes in a briefcase style and makes for a perfect laptop bag for executives. With absolute comfort for your laptop and loads of organiser space, this bag offers 360 degree access to all your gear when on the go. Bag exterior: 21.5"x12"x4" Laptop compartment: 14.3"x9.8"x0.9" Made of polyester and waxed canvas Padded laptop compartment A separate organizational storage pocket Zippered pouch at the back Two velcro closure compartments on the front and one at the back Trolley pass through flap Zippered water bottle holder on the side Removable and adjustable shoulder strap with a padded holder Haul loop for carrying ease Care Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent
